item.title: [YYZ01][Cooling System] - Rack YYZ0101A01C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 12, 11:00 - 19:30 UTC

Mar 4, 14:33 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack YYZ0101A01C.

Start time : 12/05/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 19:30 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1/BHS5/BHS7/BHS8][Infrastructure] - Electrical maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Mar 25, 10:30 - 20:00 UTC

Mar 3, 13:41 UTC
Update - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

Feb 18, 15:41 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Infrastructure.

Start time : 25/03/2026 10:30 UTC
End time : 25/03/2026 20:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance window, some servers in BHS1/BHS5/BHS7/BHS8 may be temporarily unavailable for up to 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing an electrical maintenance in BHS1/BHS5/BHS7/BHS8.

Thank you for your understanding.
